overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban environment. The player moves from a commercial plaza past a red van, through narrow back alleys with industrial debris, past a barber shop, and into an indoor commercial building. The scene features wet pavement reflecting colorful neon signs, cyberpunk architecture, and sparse pedestrian presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with digital billboards

events.description: camera moves past red van and continues walking forward through plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through wet neon-lit plaza toward the Budget Arms building with large digital displays

notable_agents.action: red delivery van parked on the left side of the plaza

entered.detail: red commercial van with white roof parked on the plaza edge
large commercial building with Budget Arms signage and prominent number 10 display
tall vertical digital billboard displaying the number 10 in bright white
blue neon sign for Cirrus on the Budget Arms building facade
multiple colorful neon signs on the left building including a large red character display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a red delivery van in a wet, neon-lit commercial plaza at night. The camera walks forward past the van toward the Budget Arms building, which features large digital billboards and bright neon signage. The pavement reflects the colorful lights, and the area is devoid of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway past Lizzie's Bar entering back alley

events.description: turns left and enters narrower covered walkway beside Lizzie's Bar
lighting becomes significantly darker with more shadows as entering the back alley area

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the side of the Lizzie's Bar building toward a narrow alley entrance

entered.detail: corner building with illuminated Lizzie's Bar signage in yellow neon
wooden shipping pallets stacked along the left wall
dark narrow passage between buildings leading to the back alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the open plaza, moving along the exterior of Lizzie's Bar with its bright yellow neon sign. The environment becomes more enclosed and darker as the camera approaches and enters a narrow back alley passage lined with stacked wooden pallets.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial back alley with trash and pallets

events.description: passes close to stacked pallets and scaffolding on the left, temporarily blocking side view
approaching end of alley with visible exit to lit street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow dark alleyway between industrial buildings with debris scattered on ground

entered.detail: metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with railings
large green metal dumpsters and trash bins along the alley walls
rusted metal scaffolding and pipes along the left building facade
concrete walls covered in graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow, dark industrial back alley with wet asphalt ground. The space is enclosed by tall buildings with an overhead metal walkway bridge visible ahead. Industrial dumpsters, metal scaffolding, and graffiti-covered walls line the passage. The lighting is dim with an orange glow from distant sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with barber shop and palm tree

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street with barber shop and visible city skyline
passes pedestrian in blue jacket walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk passing barber shop and approaching main city street with neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and beige pants walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: small building with red and white striped barber pole and red/white color scheme
tall palm tree visible against the night sky
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the background
illuminated sign with BTC text and barber pole graphics

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark alley into a wider urban street with a small barber shop featuring a classic red-and-white striped pole. A palm tree stands near the shop while towering skyscrapers rise in the background. The camera passes a pedestrian in a blue jacket and continues along the neon-lit sidewalk toward a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway approaching indoor entrance

events.description: approaching and entering indoor commercial building through metal security gates

agents.ego_description: walking toward building entrance and passing through metal security gates into indoor commercial area

entered.detail: open metal security gates with mesh design leading into building interior
green neon sign reading Dima a Buzz visible inside the entrance
red and black vending machines lining the right wall inside entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial walkway with large digital billboards overhead. The camera approaches a building entrance with open metal security gates and enters the indoor space. Inside, a green neon sign for Dima a Buzz becomes visible along with vending machines lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial lobby with vending machines and elevator

events.description: slowing approach toward elevator at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through indoor corridor toward elevator area with fluorescent lighting

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt standing near the elevator doors

entered.detail: closed elevator doors with metal finish at the end of the corridor
rectangular fluorescent light panels on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the indoor commercial building with red carpet and marble flooring. The corridor features fluorescent ceiling lights, vending machines, and posters on the walls. The camera approaches an elevator at the end of the hall where a person stands waiting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, neon-lit commercial plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a dark industrial alley. It begins by walking past a red delivery van toward the Budget Arms building, where vibrant digital billboards reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera turns left, the open space gives way to the glowing yellow signage of Lizzie's Bar before the environment narrows and darkens upon entering a back alley passage lined with wooden pallets. The scene then shifts further into a dim, enclosed corridor of wet asphalt and graffiti-covered walls, passing industrial dumpsters and metal scaffolding. Finally, the perspective pushes forward under an orange glow toward an overhead metal walkway bridge that looms over the industrial passage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban street into the sterile, enclosed corridors of a commercial building. It begins by emerging from a dark alley onto a wider sidewalk, passing a barber shop with a red-and-white striped pole and a lone palm tree beneath towering skyscrapers. As the camera moves past a pedestrian in a blue jacket, the scene shifts into a covered walkway dominated by large digital billboards overhead. The camera then glides through open metal security gates to enter an indoor space, where the outdoor neon gives way to the green glow of a Dima a Buzz sign and rows of vending machines. Finally, the environment transitions into a polished interior of red carpet and marble flooring, moving under fluorescent ceiling lights toward an elevator where a person stands waiting.
